backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that combines blob storage mixin with user profile management, page content, pricing entries, and CSR info, all protected by a role-based access control system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of replacing the hero image on ZurichCouplesLandingPage with an autoplay, muted, looping, responsive HTML5 video player.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key features of each page, component, and hook in the project.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration file that ensures the .well-known directory is included (not ignored) when deploying frontend assets.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PaarWeg React app with German language, SEO meta description, Plausible Analytics tracking, and the main React root div.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the custom domains for the canister.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public URLs for www.paarweg.com including main pages and three city/online landing pages with their last-modified dates and priorities.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, including admin and city-specific landing pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Calendly inline widget component that was removed or not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing a sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route change, and a footer with firm details and attribution.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text behind a 'Mehr anzeigen' button with a gradient fade, controlled by a feature flag.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flags configuration file; currently defines a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that computes runtime HEX color values for the app's background and primary button by injecting temporary probe DOM elements and reading their computed styles, re-computing on dark mode class changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status, wrapped in a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 certificate signing request client-side using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 keys.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers and sets up a warm sand/terracotta design token palette for both light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder presenting his background as a certified systemic master coach and co-founder of paarwärts®, with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, a hero section with photo, and details about his coaching philosophy.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: SEO-optimized landing page targeting couples in Basel seeking online couples counseling, featuring a hero section with image, CTAs to book a consultation, and structured Open Graph/meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page for PaarWeg, displaying direct contact options (email, phone, Calendly) alongside an FAQ accordion, with full SEO and Open Graph meta tag setup.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Couples coaching service page describing PaarWeg's pair coaching offering for couples in any relationship phase, with SEO meta tags, a hero section, and a mobile-collapsible read-more component.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a backend mutation, and allows the user to copy or download the CSR and public key.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: A diagnostic page that fetches `/.well-known/ic-domains` and displays whether the Internet Computer domain verification file is correctly configured for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the hero section and feature cards for the coaching service.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: A coaching-for-men landing page that sets relevant SEO metadata and renders a hero section with descriptive copy, feature cards, and a call-to-action button targeting men in relationships.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays pricing information for coaching sessions (60 CHF intro, 190 CHF full session) along with an FAQ accordion, and sets full SEO metadata including Open Graph and Twitter Card tags.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to Google Search Console.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for Swiss online couples counseling (PaarWeg) targeting communication problems, with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and JSON-LD structured data injected via useEffect.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin status page that runs diagnostic checks (DNS, SSL, CNAME, redirects, analytics) against the paarweg.com domain and displays results with status badges and a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women in relationships offering coaching services, with SEO/OG meta tag setup and a hero section using a collapsible MobileReadMore component.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: SEO-optimized landing page for couples counseling in Zurich, setting meta/OG tags on mount and rendering a hero section with a video embed and booking CTA.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely intended for Calendly type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module that converts computed CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch, hex) to uppercase HEX format, including an OKLCH-to-RGB conversion implementation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the PaarWeg website project, recording an existing feature request to replace the hero image with an MP4 video on the paarberatung-zuerich page and noting a prior build failure related to that integration.
